text.title: gov-approval-token-signed-jwt Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gov-approval-token-signed-jwt as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Issuing a long-lived (24h+) token with `scope: "*"` to "make the on-call workflow easier".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The first leaked or socially harvested token grants the agent unlimited writes for a day; the entire identity boundary collapses to one bearer string.

failure-mode.description: The agent's own service account both issues and consumes the approval token.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Self-approval erases the human-in-the-loop; an audit cannot distinguish autonomous action from approved action.
